form.formComment: Didn't do much at the last run, 6th (Fr3) over 2100m at Bunbury, beaten 25 m by Lazi Dais (2:31.40) in 4yo+ NR 70 to 80 on March 28 at $31. Before that was well back in the run when 8th (Fr5) over 2130m at Gloucester Park, beaten 11 m by Bazaar Package (2:34.90) in 4yo+ NR 65 to 75 on March 27 at $31. Finds a few better. Has the task ahead.

form.formComment: Returns from the paddock. Previously first up posted a big 4 m win (Fr5) at Bunbury (1:55.10) beating Koolbardi Navajo in 4yo+ NR 55 to 70 M on May 10 at $6. Can open the campaign with a win.

form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 8th (Fr4) over 1684m at this track, beaten 13 m by Longreach Bay (1:58.00) in 4yo+ NR 77 to 85 on March 30 at $23. Not keen on his chances in this line-up.
